ItacPersonItem.Notes: For a short biographical account see Antonino Mongitore, Bibliotheca Sicula, Felicella, Palermo, Vol.II, p. 48 (BL Shelfmark:610.m.10.) For Mario Felice`s affiliation to the Chiari academy in Catania see Mario Felice, Agatha Martirizzata, Catania, 1626
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
